# Solon Checklist

- [ ] I checked `AGENTS.md` and the active docs under `docs/agent/`.
- [ ] I confirmed this change matches `docs/agent/CURRENT_SCOPE.md`.
- [ ] I updated docs for any behavior, scope, validation, or workflow change.
- [ ] I updated or linked the relevant GitHub Issue.
- [ ] I did not use real client data in fixtures, docs, tests, or screenshots.
- [ ] If browser QA was captured, I verified `/api/v1/platform/navigation` on the same runtime first.
- [ ] Excluded top-level UI modules did not appear in acceptance screenshots.
